iot.topicrule.topicrulepayload.Actions.Description: The actions associated with the rule.

iot.topicrule.topicrulepayload.AwsIotSql.Description: The version of the SQL rules engine to use when evaluating the rule.  The default value is 2015-10-08.

iot.topicrule.topicrulepayload.ErrorActi.Description: The action to take when an error occurs.

iot.topicrule.topicrulepayload.RuleDisab.Description: Specifies whether the rule is disabled.

iot.topicrule.topicrulepayload.Sql.Description: The SQL statement used to query the topic. For more information, see [AWS IoT SQL Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot/latest/developerguide/iot-sql-reference.html) in the * AWS IoT Developer Guide*.
